description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image with mysql:latest, redis:latest, and postgres:latest services and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define the default test stage and add a test_async job that runs npm install then node ./specs/start.js ./specs/async.spec.js. Also add a test_db job that runs npm install then node ./specs/start.js ./specs/db-postgres.spec.js. Both jobs use the cache and have no special rules.
